subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath made known unto us His path, and taught us that which draweth us nigh unto Him in all conditions, and hath vouchsafed unto us His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی عرفنا سبیله و علمنا ما یقربنا الیه فیکل الاحوال و رزقنا لقائه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @personal instructions, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @wisdom [hikmat]
